recommendations.title: Summer Camp
recommendations.overview: A group of people have just signed up to be camp Councillors at a foreign country.  They expect the camp to be the place for a memorable summer.  Instead, something strange is going on and some of the campers begin to act strange.  Things go terribly

recommendations.title: Sleepaway Camp
recommendations.overview: Years after a terrible boating accident, Angela is sent to Camp Arawak where a series of bizarre and violent "accidents" begin to claim the lives of various campers.

recommendations.title: Lady in White
recommendations.overview: Locked in a school closet during Halloween 1962, young Frank witnesses the ghost of a young girl and the man who murdered her years ago. Shortly afterward he finds himself stalked by the killer and is soon drawn to an old house where a mysterious Lad

recommendations.title: Night of the Dark Full Moon
recommendations.overview: A man investigates the grisly crimes that occurred in a former insane asylum, unsettling the locals who all seem to have something to hide.

recommendations.title: The Initiation
recommendations.overview: An amnesiac sorority member who has been plagued by a recurring nightmare is stalked alongside other coeds by a killer in a deserted department store where they are completing a hazing ritual.

recommendations.title: Black Christmas
recommendations.overview: A group of sorority pledges are stalked by a stranger during their Christmas break. That is until the young women discover that the killer is part of an underground campus conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Return to Sleepaway Camp
recommendations.overview: When campers and staff at Camp Manabe mysteriously begin disappearing and turning into gruesome corpses, paranoid Ronnie can't shake the memory of a series of grisly murders that took place at Camp Arawak two decades earlier.

recommendations.title: The Cabin in the Woods
recommendations.overview: Five friends set out for a weekend at a remote cabin in the woods, expecting nothing more than fun and relaxation. As night falls, they discover that something far more unsettling is at work and that nothing about their getaway is what it seems.

recommendations.title: The Nines
recommendations.overview: A troubled actor, a television show runner, and an acclaimed videogame designer find their lives intertwining in mysterious and unsettling ways.

recommendations.title: Prey
recommendations.overview: An American family on holiday in Africa becomes lost in a game reserve and stalked by vicious killer lions.
